message:
chore(release): bump version to 2.1.0 + warning/test cleanup

Major work since 2.0.5:
- feat(config): real schemars-backed JSON schema output
- feat(telemetry): unique parquet filenames, sound ring-buffer writes,
  expanded API, real flush path, partial-flush resilience, path sanitization
- feat(installer): --emit-skill-payload flag and skill bundling in releases
- perf(inference): cache Beta/Gamma prior constants in compute_posterior
- fix: gate io-uring/prober/parse_proc_net_unix behind cfg(target_os = "linux")
- fix(installer): simplify skill installation to inline payload
- fix(telemetry): timestamp filtering, stats, naming, cleanup hardening

Pre-release polish:
- Drop unused BlastRadiusEstimatorConfig import
- #![allow(dead_code)] on shared test support module (per-binary subsets)
- Default impl for FixedSizeEvent (clippy: new_without_default)
- prober test: use struct-update syntax (clippy: field_reassign_with_default)
- writer.rs: enumerate() instead of manual counter (clippy: explicit_counter_loop)
- direct_impact: relax isolated-process threshold to match new default weights
- snapshot_persist: drop contradictory omitted_sections.contains assertion
- e2e_session_diff: explicitly request --format md for plain rendering test
- lineage test: drop unsigned-vs-zero comparison

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "pt-core"
-version = "2.0.5"
+version = "2.1.0"
 edition = "2021"
 description = "Process Triage core inference and decision engine"
 license = "MIT"
